## Problem

What user or agent problem does this solve?

## Desired Behavior

What should the bridge do?

## Suggested Tool Or API

Example:

- `inspect_video(url)`
- `create_agent_brief(url, goal)`

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Tool behavior is documented
- [ ] Cache behavior is clear
- [ ] Self-test or targeted test exists
- [ ] README/docs updated if user-facing
